chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-2065 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 8146/25 2.For orders on CMA 8147/25 3.For hearing of main case 16-12-2025 Asadullah Arbani (petitioner) present in person. **** 1. Urgent application is granted. 2&3. When confronted as to the maintainability of instant petition as earlier for the same relief, the petitioner had filed C.P.No.D-386 of 2023, which was dismissed for non-prosecution vide order dated 13.03.2025; therefore, he does not press instant petition and submits that he will file restoration application etc. in the disposed of petition. Order accordingly. Instant petition along with listed application(s) stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
